title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 392.050 - Directors, procedure for election of
text:
392.050.  Directors, procedure for election of. — All elections for directors shall conform to the requirements of law governing private business corporations.
(RSMo 1939 § 5324, A.L. 1975 S.B. 89) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4919; 1919 § 10130; 1909 § 3324
